zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella於1525年出生在英國維爾爾堂頓時，她的父親Henrie Beelees Storke25歲，母親Lucie Dakyns26歲。她和Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter至少有3個女兒。她去世於1590年在英國英格蘭維爾爾牛頓 托尼享年65歲，埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella was born in 1525, in Downton, Wiltshire, England, her father, Henrie Beelees Storke, was 25 and her mother, Lucie Dakyns, was 26. She had at least 3 daughters with Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter. She died in 1590, in Newton Tony, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella est née en 1525, à Downton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Henrie Beelees Storke, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lucie Dakyns, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter. Elle est décédée en 1590, à Newton Tony, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella 1525 in Downton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henrie Beelees Storke 25 und ihre Mutter Lucie Dakyns 26. Sie hatte mit Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1590 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Newton Tony, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabellaが1525年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントンで生まれた時，父Henrie Beelees Storkeは25歳，母Lucie Dakynsは26歳であった。彼女はRobert Whealon Reade-Carpenterとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1590年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアニュートン トニーで65歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella(이)가 1525년 영국 윌츠히르 다운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henrie Beelees Storke(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucie Dakyns(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 뉴턴 토니에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella родилась в 1525 г. в местности доунтон, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henrie Beelees Storke было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucie Dakyns, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter. Она умерла в 1590 г. в местности нютон тони, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.
